LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF JOHN YEE'S MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER, FOR TRO, AND OSC RE CONFIRMATION OF APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER AND ISSUANCE OF PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION - A RECEIVER WILL BE APPOINTED AS OF JULY 25, 2012. IF MR. YEE IS TAKEN OUT BY JULY 25, THERE WILL BE NO NEED FOR A RECEIVER. THE COURT ALSO ORDERED THAT THERE WILL BE NO PAYMENT FOR IMPROVEMENTS TO THE BUILDING OTHER THAN ITS NORMAL MAINTENANCE. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Continued To Dec-26-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Appointment Of Receiver, For Tro, And Osc Re Confirmation Of Appointment Of Receiver And Issuance Of Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jul-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARK J. ROMERO, TEL. NO. 395-9315 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. STAN D. BLYTH OF LEE, LAWLESS & BLYTH, TEL. NO. (510) 272-0200 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
ATTY. JAMES GRACH, TEL. NO. 595-4348 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF JOHN YEE'S MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER, FOR TRO, AND OSC RE CONFIRMATION OF APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER AND ISSUANCE OF PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION - A RECEIVER WILL BE APPOINTED AS OF JULY 25, 2012. IF MR. YEE IS TAKEN OUT BY JULY 25, THERE WILL BE NO NEED FOR A RECEIVER. THE COURT ALSO ORDERED THAT THERE WILL BE NO PAYMENT FOR IMPROVEMENTS TO THE BUILDING OTHER THAN ITS NORMAL MAINTENANCE. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order by way of e-mail to the court) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/HEK)

Motion For Appointment Of Receiver, For Tro, And Osc Re Confirmation Of Appointment Of Receiver And Issuance Of Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jul-06-2012 Continued To Jul-10-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER, FOR TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER, AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE CONFIRMATION OF APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER AND ISSUANCE OF PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.
Appearances: Mark J. Romeo (395.9315) for plaintiff and moving party; Stan D. Blyth of Lee Lawless & Blyth (510.272.0200) and James T. Graeb (595.4348) for defendant Mongtomery Realty Group, Inc.
Discussed and the court continued the matter to July 10, 2012 for hearing. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976
